_comment: metro → city → portal vendor → URL → creds-key (spec §13.2). OC permit/portal vendors VERIFIED from the proven BBC agents (current as of 2026-06). LA/Nashville use Socrata open-data APIs. Per spec §4.1 footer: re-verify every per-jurisdiction vendor and Socrata dataset id in Phase 0 — they drift. 'verify' fields flag what must be confirmed before that source goes live.

LA.verify: VERIFIED LIVE 2026-06-26 — LADBS 'Building Permits' dataset pi9x-tg5x on data.lacity.org returns current data (latest issue_date 2026-06-21) via the SODA API. Columns: primary_address, apn, pin_nbr, permit_nbr, permit_type, permit_sub_type, use_desc, issue_date, status_desc, valuation, work_desc. App token optional (anonymous queries work). Re-confirm if it ever 0-returns.
phase-0 — EPIC-LA (Accela) for unincorporated LA County

NASHVILLE.verify: DRIFT FOUND 2026-06-26 — the prior id data.nashville.gov/resource/3h5w-q8b7.json is DEAD (data.nashville.gov migrated to ArcGIS Hub; every /resource/<id>.json now 302s to hub.arcgis.com/legacy). The WORKING SODA feed is the Tyler Data & Insights BLDS partner host permits.partner.socrata.com/resource/7ky7-xbzp.json (standardized BLDS schema: permitnum, description, applieddate, issueddate, originaladdress1, permitclassmapped, workclassmapped, estprojectcostdec, contractorcompanyname). CAVEAT: partner feed's latest issueddate observed was stale (2016) — a short lookback may legitimately return 0 rows and the agent degrades to []. Phase-0: find a fresher live SODA/JSON endpoint (ArcGIS FeatureServer query or current Tyler BLDS id) and update here. App token optional.
